title: 5 FX Notes User Management
body_text:
5 	FX Notes User Management
5.1	Overview of FX Notes Access and Administration
To access FX Notes the user must have a Client Centre User ID with access to the FX Notes application.
This chapter describes how to grant FX Notes access to authorized users. For information on modifying or deleting usersГўВҖВҷ access to applications (e.g., FX Notes), see the User Management Part or CPS Admin Part as applicable.
5.2	FX Notes User Types
There are three types of FX Notes users at the financial institution level. These users are categorized as standard users, managers, or auditors. At a high level, standard users are responsible for processing transactions on FX Notes; managers are responsible for setting spreads, setting transaction fees, and posting notices; and auditors are responsible for reconciliation. When setting up FX Notes users in CPS Admin, enter ГўВҖВңYГўВҖВқ or ГўВҖВңYesГўВҖВқ beside the applicable user role as shown in the table below. Alternatively, select the applicable user type from the drop-down menu when setting up FX Notes users in User Management. See the User Management Part for procedures.
Note:	FX Notes users are limited to only one role per user.
User Type in User Management
User Type in CPS Admin
Responsibilities
FX Notes Standard User
standard user
Sells and buys foreign currencies
Views orders
FX Notes Manager
manager
Standard User responsibilities
Views exchange rates with and without spreads
Manages spreads
Manages transaction fees
Posts notices
Views and downloads reports for all of the financial institutionГўВҖВҷs branches
FX Notes Auditor
auditor
Read-only access
Views and downloads reports
Views and downloads rates
5.3	Granting FX Notes Access to a Client Centre User
There are currently two user management applications running parallel: the Central Portal System (CPS) Admin and User Management. Client Centre Users are displayed in both systems, so you can assign access to FX Notes in either CPS Admin or User Management.
This section describes how a CPS Admin Security Officer assigns access to FX Notes via CPS Admin. For information on how to assign FX Notes access via User Management, see the User Management Part.
Important:
ItГўВҖВҷs highly recommended that you use User Management to set up and manage your FX Notes users. Users can only be assigned to one user role, and this is best managed through User Management. If using CPS Admin, ensure that you only assign one user role per individual or they may have problems accessing FX Notes.
You must be authorized to assign FX Notes access to others (i.e., you must have administrative access rights) before proceeding. For more information, see Section 5.4, Granting FX Notes Access to an Existing CPS Admin Security Officer.
To grant FX Notes access to a new or existing Client Centre User via CPS Admin:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
CPS Admin
. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Accessing CPS Admin
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Enter the code thatГўВҖВҷs generated on your registered 2-step security token, then select
Done
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Entering the Code from the 2-Step Security Token
The CPS Admin main menu appears if youГўВҖВҷre successfully authenticated.
Important
:	Always log off the Client Centre and close the browser when you step away from your desk or when youГўВҖВҷre finished using the system.
Select
Click here
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Accessing CPS Admin
Select
Edit User
to add FX Notes to an existing Client Centre User. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on editing Client Centre Users.
Alternatively, select
Add User
if the individual is not yet set up as a Client Centre User. See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on creating Client Centre Users.
Scroll down to the Applications Menu once the userГўВҖВҷs profile is displayed, then check the box beside FX Notes. Complete the fields as described below. See Figure 6.
ГўВ‘
User Role ГўВҖВ“
Select the user role. See Section 5.2, FX Notes User Types, for a description.
Important:
Ensure that you only assign one user role or the individual may have problems accessing FX Notes.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Branches
- If a standard user role is selected, enter the transit numbers for each branch the user is authorized to access. Separate the branches with a comma (e.g., 080912010,080912011,080912012, etc.)
Note:	If the Branches field is left blank, the user will have access to all branches.
Figure 6: Assigning FX Notes Access
Select
Submit
at the bottom of the page.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer authorize the task.
5.4	Granting FX Notes Access to an Existing CPS Admin Security Officer
There are two ways to manage your CPS Admin Security Officers, depending on the change required. You can either send a request to Central 1 to make a change on your behalf, or you can make the change directly on the User Management application.
If your financial institution has at least two existing CPS Admin Security Officers with administrative access to FX Notes, they can assign other CPS Admin Security Officers with personal and/or administrative access via User Management. See the User Management Part for more information. Otherwise, complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035, described as follows.
To grant FX Notes access to an existing CPS Admin Security Officer via Central 1:
Complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035. See Figure 7. Completion of the form is self-explanatory, but note the following:
ГўВ‘
Change Request Details ГўВҖВ“ Personal Access Rights
ГўВҲВ’
Record ГўВҖВңFX NotesГўВҖВқ in the Personal Access Rights section if the individual requires access to FX Notes.
ГўВҲВ’
Record the user type. For example, if the user is an FX Notes Standard User, record ГўВҖВңstandard userГўВҖВқ. A description of the user types and roles is provided in Section 5.2, FX Notes User Types.
Important:
Ensure that you only assign one user role or the individual may have problems accessing FX Notes.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Change Request Details ГўВҖВ“ Administrative Rights
ГўВҲВ’
Record ГўВҖВңFX NotesГўВҖВқ in the Administrative Rights section if the individual is permitted to assign FX Notes access to Client Centre Users and other CPS Admin Security Officers (personal access only).
ГўВ‘Вў
Financial Institution Authorization
ГўВҲВ’
Ensure that two authorized signing officers sign the form.
Figure 7: CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central 1.
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
Related Information
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request,
Form 2035
5.5	Granting FX Notes Access to a New CPS Admin Security Officer
CPS Admin Security Officers canГўВҖВҷt create other CPS Admin Security Officers. These requests must be sent to Central 1. To grant FX Notes access to a new CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete the CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918. See Figure 8. Completion of the form is self-explanatory, but note the following:
ГўВ‘
Personal Access Rights
ГўВҲВ’
Record ГўВҖВңFX NotesГўВҖВқ in the Personal Access Rights section if the individual requires access to FX Notes.
Important: 	Ensure that you only assign one user role or the individual may have problems accessing FX Notes.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Administrative Rights
ГўВҲВ’
Record ГўВҖВңFX NotesГўВҖВқ in the Administrative Rights section if the individual is permitted to assign FX Notes access to Client Centre Users and other CPS Admin Security Officers (personal access only).
ГўВ‘Вў
Financial Institution Authorization
ГўВҲВ’
Ensure that two authorized signing officers sign the form.
Figure 8: CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918
Forward the form to your central credit union as indicated on page 2. If applicable, the central credit union will authorize the form and forward it to Central 1.
Central 1 will communicate a unique one-time password to new CPS Admin Security Officers. The CPS Admin Security Officer can refer to the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on registering a password on CPS Admin.
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer assign a 2-step security token to the new CPS Admin Security Officer. See the 2-Step Security Part for procedures.
Related Information
CPS Admin Appointment Certificate,
Form 1918
FX Notes Branch Locations,
Form 5898
END
